phase: ARIS Active-Context Transition Engine & Autonomous Loop Gate
summary: AC-TRANS-03 installs the Próxima fase in ROADMAP_CANONICAL.md, replaces OPERATOR_PREFERENCES.md with the autonomous loop handler (TRIGGER 1, TRIGGER 2, REGRA DE ADVANCE_MODE, REGRA DE RESPOSTA), adds REGRA DE TRANSICAO to MANDATORY_READ_FIRST_RULES.md, updates the validator to enforce next_phase against the Próxima fase, refreshes the test suite (test_validate_active_context.py), archives the stale anti-corruption validator tests, and advances state from AC-OBS-02 to AC-TRANS-03.
